subcodes.first_line: The entirety of the world was enraptured by the mention of this wondrous Day, yearning for its revelation throughout the nights and days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع عالم بذکر این یوم بدیع مسرور و ظهورش را آمل بودند و در لیالی و ایام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
